role_summary: Defines target user personas, their operational goals, needs, and pipeline stage mappings to guide system design, while identifying specification gaps requiring resolution before production deployment.
extracted_finding: The specification outlines three core personas: Onboarding Engineering Practitioner, Technical Writer & System Architect, and Portfolio Manager & Acquisition Integrator. Functional responsibilities mapped to these personas include structural analysis, granular domain extraction, section synthesis, cross-cutting derivation, and workspace lifecycle management. Key domain concepts involve technology-agnostic documentation generation, deterministic pipeline execution, explicit traceability to source artifacts, production noise filtration, and dual-mode output generation. Business rules mandate preserving explicit information gaps rather than speculating, maintaining upgrade-safe documentation contracts, and ensuring auditability via timestamped provenance. Documented specification gaps require future definition of role-based configuration presets, access controls, CI/CD integration schemas, conflict resolution strategies for contradictory insights, and heuristics for classifying non-essential artifacts.
